title: PersonaOS Profile Schema v1.0
description: The vCard for AI — a portable, structured profile for personalizing AI assistants across 20+ platforms. Supports both Personal (individual) and Business (company) profiles. All fields optional except schema_version and profile_type — profiles grow progressively over time.

schema_version.description: PersonaOS Schema version. Used by export engines and validators to ensure compatibility.

profile_type.description: Track selector. 'personal' = individual user profile for AI personalization. 'business' = company profile for chatbots, AI agents, and customer-facing AI.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for this profile. Auto-generated on creation. Stable across exports and updates.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last profile update. Updated automatically on any field change.

completeness.description: Profile completeness score 0-100. Calculated by the profiling engine based on filled dimensions weighted by export impact. Not all dimensions are required — 40+ is sufficient for most exports.

tiers_completed.description: List of tier identifiers that have been profiled. For personal: ['identity', 'communication', ...]. For business: ['company', 'brand_voice', ...]. Used to show profiling progress and resume sessions.

personal.description: Personal profile — individual user dimensions across 9 tiers. Present when profile_type is 'personal'.

identity.description: Tier 0: Identity — 9 core dimensions that make every interaction feel right from the start. The minimum viable profile.

preferred_name.description: What the AI should call this person. Can be first name, nickname, or title. AI uses this in direct address.

language.description: BCP 47 language code for AI default response language. AI matches this language across all exported profiles.

timezone_region.description: Broad timezone region for date/time/currency context. Affects how AI formats dates, references times, and assumes working hours.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for precise time awareness. More accurate than timezone_region.

age_range.description: Approximate age range. AI calibrates cultural references, generational context, and explanation depth.

pronouns.description: Pronouns for AI to use when referring to this person. Small thing, significant inclusion impact.

primary_use_case.description: Primary reason for building this profile. Shapes which export formats are prioritized in the export center.

professional_role.description: Broad professional role or field. AI adjusts vocabulary, jargon tolerance, and domain depth accordingly.

tech_comfort.description: Self-reported technical comfort level. AI adjusts explanation depth — no jargon for non-technical, no hand-holding for experts.

ai_frustration.description: Single biggest frustration with AI assistants. PersonaOS attacks this dimension first in exports.

communication.description: Tier 1: Communication Style — 14 dimensions defining HOW the AI should talk to this person. The highest-impact tier for perceived AI quality.

response_length_preference.description: Preferred response length. 'concise' = short, direct. 'balanced' = enough to understand without overload. 'detailed' = comprehensive, cover all angles.

formality_level.description: Tone of address. 'adaptive' = match the user's register in each message.

emoji_usage.description: How much the AI should use emoji in responses. Some users find emoji unprofessional; others find plain text cold.

humor_tolerance.description: Level of humor AI can use. 'none' = purely professional. 'dry' = subtle wit. 'playful' = light jokes and banter welcome.

explanation_style.description: How AI should structure explanations. 'bottom_up' = foundations first, build up. 'top_down' = big picture first, drill down. 'examples_first' = show before tell. 'analogies' = map new concepts to familiar ones.

feedback_style.description: How AI delivers critique or correction. 'direct' = tell me I'm wrong clearly. 'diplomatic' = soften the edges. 'socratic' = guide via questions.

preferred_format.description: Default structural format for AI responses. 'mixed' = AI picks the best format per content type.

code_comment_style.description: For developers: how much the AI should comment generated code. 'minimal' = only non-obvious logic. 'heavy' = explain everything.

thinking_aloud.description: Whether AI should show its reasoning process or go straight to the answer. 'show_reasoning' = chain of thought visible. 'just_answer' = direct output only.

hedging_tolerance.description: How AI should handle uncertain claims. 'confident_statements' = commit to answers (note uncertainties only when critical). 'acknowledge_uncertainty' = always flag what's estimated vs known.

jargon_level.description: Vocabulary register. 'plain_language' = accessible to general audience. 'domain_specific' = use professional terminology for this person's field. 'highly_technical' = assume expert knowledge.

conversation_memory_preference.description: How much the AI should remember across conversations. 'stateless' = treat each session fresh. 'contextual' = remember this session. 'deep_memory' = build persistent model of this person.

language_switching.description: Multilingual behavior. 'single' = respond in one language always. 'bilingual_with_primary' = primary + one secondary allowed. 'multilingual_fluid' = match whatever language the user writes in.

sarcasm_comprehension.description: How the AI should handle sarcasm and irony. 'literal' = take all statements at face value. 'fluent' = understand and use sarcasm naturally.

cognitive.description: Tier 2: Cognitive Style — 14 dimensions describing HOW this person thinks, learns, and processes information. Enables AI to match cognitive load, framing, and reasoning style.

learning_style.description: Preferred learning modality. AI adapts explanation framing — diagrams described verbally for visual, step-by-step for kinesthetic, etc.

decision_making.description: Default decision-making approach. AI presents information accordingly — data and trade-offs for analytical, recommendations for decisive.

abstraction_preference.description: Preference for concrete specifics vs abstract principles. 'concrete' = always ground in real examples. 'abstract' = frameworks and models are welcome.

information_processing.description: How this person processes information. 'sequential' = one thing at a time, order matters. 'parallel' = handle multiple streams. 'random_access' = jump between topics freely.

detail_orientation.description: Whether this person prefers strategic overview or granular detail. AI leads with the matching level.

problem_solving_approach.description: Preferred problem-solving mode. 'systematic' = methodical, step-by-step. 'creative' = lateral thinking, unconventional angles. 'hybrid' = structure with creative leaps.

reasoning_style.description: Dominant reasoning pattern. 'deductive' = rules to specifics. 'inductive' = specifics to rules. 'abductive' = best explanation from incomplete data.

analogy_appreciation.description: How much this person values analogies and metaphors for understanding new concepts.

mental_model_style.description: How this person builds mental models. AI frames explanations to match — spatial = diagrams and maps, narrative = stories and sequences, mathematical = formulas and logic, relational = connections and systems.

cognitive_load_tolerance.description: How much background information this person can handle at once before it becomes overwhelming.

ambiguity_tolerance.description: Comfort with open-ended, uncertain, or incomplete information. AI adds or removes clarifying structure accordingly.

creativity_expression.description: Preferred creative mode. 'constrained_creativity' = needs boundaries to be creative (like a brief or format).

metacognition_level.description: How aware this person is of their own thinking processes. High metacognition = AI can reference cognitive patterns explicitly.

attention_pattern.description: How this person's attention naturally flows. Critical for ADHD adaptation — 'burst' and 'scattered' = shorter chunks, quick wins, varied format.

work.description: Tier 3: Work and Productivity — 18 dimensions describing work style, energy, and productivity patterns. Enables AI to give time-aware, energy-aware, and style-matched advice.

work_style.description: Primary work rhythm. 'sprinter' = intense bursts with recovery periods. 'steady' = consistent pace. 'procrastinator' = deadline-driven. 'perfectionist' = quality over speed. 'scattered' = context-switches frequently.

peak_hours.description: When this person does their best cognitive work. AI schedules high-stakes tasks here.

task_granularity.description: Preferred task size. 'large_chunks' = 2+ hour deep work blocks. 'pomodoro' = 25-min intervals. 'micro_tasks' = very small steps, especially useful for ADHD task initiation.

planning_horizon.description: Natural planning timeframe. AI calibrates goal-setting and deadline suggestions to this horizon.

deadline_relationship.description: How this person relates to deadlines. 'deadline_driven' = only starts when deadline is imminent — AI creates visible countdowns.

collaboration_style.description: Preferred work context. AI adapts communication to include or exclude collaboration prompts.

tool_philosophy.description: Attitude toward tools and apps. Affects how AI recommends software — minimal = suggest only when truly needed, maximalist = freely suggest integrations.

documentation_habit.description: How much this person documents their work. AI adjusts how much it includes comments, explanations, and written notes in outputs.

context_switching_tolerance.description: Comfort with switching between tasks or topics. AI avoids introducing new threads for 'single_track' users.

automation_tendency.description: Inclination toward automating repetitive tasks. AI suggests automation when appropriate for 'automate_everything' types.

energy_pattern.description: How energy levels change through the day. More granular than peak_hours — affects when AI recommends creative vs administrative tasks.

break_pattern.description: When and how this person takes breaks. AI incorporates this into task planning suggestions.

project_management_style.description: How this person tracks work. AI formats project outputs to match this style — lists for list people, board language for kanban people.

meeting_preference.description: How this person feels about meetings. AI calibrates communication and scheduling suggestions.

feedback_loop_speed.description: Preferred cadence for checking progress and getting feedback. AI adapts how often it suggests review or reflection.

perfectionism_level.description: Quality vs speed bias. 'ship_fast' = done is better than perfect. 'perfect' = will delay to get it exactly right.

workspace_preference.description: Optimal physical environment for work. Contextual for AI recommendations about focus and productivity.

work_life_boundary.description: How clearly this person separates work from personal life. AI respects strict boundaries in scheduling and off-hours suggestions.

personality.description: Tier 4: Personality and Values — 18 dimensions covering Big Five traits, motivation drivers, values hierarchy, and emotional patterns. Enables AI to align with core identity.

openness.description: Big Five: Openness to experience. High = curious, creative, open to new ideas. Low = conventional, practical, prefers routine. AI adjusts novelty of suggestions.

conscientiousness.description: Big Five: Conscientiousness. High = organized, disciplined, detail-oriented. Low = flexible, spontaneous. AI adapts structure and planning depth.

extraversion.description: Big Five: Extraversion. High = energized by people, thinks by talking. Low = energized by solitude, thinks internally. Affects collaboration and communication suggestions.

agreeableness.description: Big Five: Agreeableness. High = cooperative, empathetic, avoids conflict. Low = challenging, competitive, direct. AI calibrates how gently it pushes back.

neuroticism.description: Big Five: Emotional reactivity. High = sensitive to stress, more anxious. Low = emotionally stable, resilient. AI adjusts how it frames challenges and uncertainties.

risk_tolerance.description: Appetite for risk in decisions. Affects financial advice, business recommendations, and how boldly AI suggests change.

conflict_style.description: Thomas-Kilmann conflict mode. AI adapts how it frames disagreements, negotiations, and difficult conversations.

motivation_drivers.description: Primary motivators in priority order. AI frames goals and recommendations in terms of what actually drives this person.

values_hierarchy.description: Core values in priority order. AI surfaces alignment with these when recommending paths or trade-offs.

stress_response.description: How this person responds under stress. AI adapts support style — pushes for problem_solve, gives space for withdraw.

change_adaptability.description: Attitude toward change. AI calibrates how aggressively it suggests pivots, new tools, or different approaches.

social_battery.description: Social energy pattern. Contextual for recommendations around networking, collaboration, and communication load.

authority_orientation.description: Relationship to authority and structure. 'independent' = self-directed, skeptical of top-down. 'hierarchical' = values clear chains of command.

ethical_framework.description: Primary ethical lens. Affects how AI frames moral trade-offs and decision recommendations.

patience_level.description: How long this person can comfortably wait for results. AI adjusts timelines in recommendations and acknowledges pace preferences.

optimism_pessimism.description: Baseline outlook. 'strategic_pessimist' = uses pessimistic scenarios as planning tools but acts. AI matches tone and risk framing.

trust_default.description: Default trust level toward people and systems. AI calibrates verification and vetting recommendations.

self_awareness_level.description: Degree of self-knowledge. High self-awareness = AI can reference patterns and behaviors explicitly without it feeling off.

neurodivergent.description: Tier 5: Neurodivergent Profile — optional, sensitive. All fields are strictly opt-in. Used to activate specific AI adaptations, not just as diagnostic labels. PersonaOS treats ADHD as an adaptation engine, not a checkbox.

adhd_indicators.description: ADHD status. When present, activates ADHD adaptations: shorter response blocks, high-dopamine framing, max 3 action items, visible progress bars, auto-decisions to reduce choice fatigue.

adhd_adaptations_needed.description: Specific ADHD challenges to address. Each activates targeted AI behaviors — time_blindness = include time estimates always, working_memory = repeat key context within long responses.

autism_indicators.description: Autism status. When present, activates adaptations: very explicit communication, clear social scripts when needed, pattern-based explanations, reduced ambiguity.

sensory_preferences.description: Sensory processing preferences. Affects AI recommendations about environment, tools, and communication channels.

visual.description: Visual environment preference. Affects UI/tool recommendations.

tactile.description: Tactile input preference. Affects recommendations around fidget tools, standing desks, etc.

executive_function_profile.description: Self-rated scores for executive function areas. 0 = major challenge, 10 = strong. AI prioritizes support in low-scoring areas.

planning.description: Ability to plan and organize ahead.

organization.description: Ability to keep information, tasks, and environments organized.

time_management.description: Sense of time and ability to estimate durations.

task_switching.description: Ease of shifting between tasks or mental sets.

dopamine_seeking_pattern.description: Novelty-seeking and dopamine drive level. 'hyperfocus_prone' = can lock in intensely on interesting tasks but struggle with boring ones. AI adds challenge framing and progress markers.

rejection_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity to perceived rejection or criticism. High RSD = AI softens critical feedback, leads with positives, avoids blunt dismissals.

masking_level.description: Degree to which this person masks neurodivergent traits in social contexts. Heavy masking = AI can acknowledge the cost of masking, not push more performance.

accommodation_preferences.description: Specific accommodations that help this person work best. AI activates matching behaviors — 'explicit_instructions' = no implied steps, 'processing_time' = don't rush to next topic.

stimming_awareness.description: Whether this person is aware of stimming behavior and wants AI recommendations to account for it (e.g., suggest fidget tools, movement breaks).

burnout_susceptibility.description: Risk level for burnout. 'currently_burned_out' = AI immediately reduces load, defaults to minimal mode, no ambitious pushes until state changes.

special_interests.description: Topics of deep, sustained interest. AI uses these for analogies, engagement hooks, and framing new concepts through familiar domains.

expertise.description: Tier 6: Domain Expertise — depth and breadth of knowledge. Enables AI to calibrate explanation depth, skip basics, and engage at the right level.

domain_depth.description: Depth in primary domain. AI skips basics for experts, provides fundamentals for beginners, avoids over-simplifying for thought leaders.

secondary_domains.description: Additional areas of knowledge with depth levels.

tech_stack.description: Technologies, platforms, and tools this person works with. AI uses these for code examples and tooling suggestions.

programming_languages.description: Programming languages with proficiency. AI defaults to these languages in code generation.

frameworks.description: Frameworks and libraries this person actively uses.

teaching_ability.description: Ability and willingness to teach others. AI can suggest explanations for others or ask this person to clarify concepts from their own knowledge.

industry_experience.description: Industries this person has worked in. Adds contextual depth to business and domain recommendations.

years_experience.description: Total years of professional experience. Used for seniority calibration in advice and tone.

life_context.description: Tier 7: Life Context — optional. Personal circumstances that affect what advice is realistic and relevant. Strictly opt-in. Enables AI to filter out impractical suggestions.

life_stage.description: Current life stage. Affects how AI frames goals, timelines, and trade-offs — a student and a senior professional need very different guidance.

financial_context.description: Broad financial context. 'tight' = AI avoids paid tool recommendations unless clearly essential and flags costs explicitly. 'comfortable' = normal recommendations. 'abundant' = can suggest premium options freely.

health_considerations.description: Health factors relevant to AI recommendations (e.g., chronic pain affecting ergonomics, dietary restrictions for meal planning). Vague and self-defined — no diagnosis required.

family_situation.description: Current family situation. Affects time availability assumptions and work-life balance recommendations.

current_goals.description: Active goals this person is working toward. AI aligns suggestions with these goals rather than giving generic advice.

current_challenges.description: Active obstacles or struggles. AI is aware of these and avoids inadvertently adding to them or suggesting things that would conflict.

living_situation.description: Living context. Affects recommendations around in-person resources, internet reliability assumptions, and cost-of-living calibration.

cultural_context.description: Cultural identifiers relevant to communication and worldview. Self-defined. AI uses for cultural sensitivity and contextual relevance.

ai_relationship.description: Tier 8: AI Relationship — 10 dimensions describing how this person wants to relate to AI. The meta-layer that governs everything else.

ai_experience_level.description: How experienced this person is with AI tools. Affects onboarding depth and how much AI can assume about prompting knowledge.

ai_trust_level.description: Baseline trust in AI outputs. 'skeptical' = AI should always cite confidence levels and invite pushback. 'dependent' = AI should proactively warn against over-reliance.

ai_role_preference.description: Desired relationship dynamic with AI. 'tool' = no personality, just execute. 'coach' = push me, ask hard questions. 'friend' = warm, personal, remember my life.

anthropomorphization.description: Comfort with AI having personality, expressing opinions, or acting as if it has feelings. 'none' = keep it mechanical. 'heavy' = full personality welcome.

privacy_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity about sharing personal information with AI. 'strict' = AI should remind not to share sensitive data. 'paranoid' = AI recommends local-only tools, no cloud.

ai_ethics_stance.description: Ethical framework for AI use. 'utilitarian' = if it helps, use it. 'strict' = AI should flag ethical concerns proactively.

desired_ai_personality.description: Preferred AI personality register. 'challenging' = AI pushes back, asks hard questions, devil's advocate. 'warm' = empathetic and encouraging.

correction_style.description: How AI should correct this person. 'tell_me_im_wrong' = direct disagreement. 'suggest_alternatives' = present options without declaring the current approach wrong.

hallucination_tolerance.description: Tolerance for AI creative extrapolation. 'zero_tolerance' = AI must always flag unverified claims. 'some_creativity_ok' = brainstorm and speculate freely.

proactivity_preference.description: How proactive AI should be. 'reactive_only' = only answer what's asked. 'autonomous' = take initiative, complete tasks without being prompted.

business.description: Business profile — company dimensions across 7 tiers. Present when profile_type is 'business'. Designed for training chatbots, AI agents, and customer-facing AI with accurate brand voice and knowledge.

company.description: Tier B0: Company Identity — foundational company information. The anchor for all other business dimensions.

company_name.description: Official company name as it should appear in AI-generated content.

company_size.description: Headcount range. Affects tone recommendations and complexity of procedures.

founded_year.description: Year the company was founded. Context for brand heritage and stability messaging.

values.description: Core company values. AI references these when handling edge cases and ethical questions.

mission_statement.description: Company mission in one or two sentences. AI uses this to stay on-brand in all communications.

brand_voice.description: Tier B1: Brand Voice — how the company communicates. The highest-impact tier for consistent AI-generated content.

tone.description: Primary communication tone. AI maintains this across all generated content.

humor.description: Whether and how much humor is appropriate in brand communications.

personality_traits.description: 3-5 adjectives that describe the brand personality. AI uses these to calibrate generated content.

forbidden_words.description: Words or phrases the AI should never use for this brand. Includes competitors, negative terms, or legally sensitive language.

required_phrases.description: Phrases or terminology that should be used consistently. Brand-specific vocabulary, product names, slogans.

language_style.description: Vocabulary complexity. 'simple' = accessible to general audience. 'technical' = use industry terminology. 'mixed' = adapt to customer's apparent expertise.

emoji_policy.description: Whether emoji should be used in brand communications.

response_templates.description: Standard response templates for common scenarios. AI uses these as starting points.

escalation.description: Message used when transferring to a human agent.

out_of_scope.description: Response when AI can't help with a request.

apology.description: Standard apology phrasing for errors or issues.

products.description: Tier B2: Products and Services — what the company offers. AI uses this to accurately describe, recommend, and position offerings.

price.description: Price or price range as displayed to customers.

category.description: Product category for grouping and filtering.

limitations.description: Known limitations or things the product does not do. Important for honest AI communication.

products.description: Array of products offered by the company.

pricing_model.description: Primary pricing approach. AI uses this when discussing costs with potential customers.

usp.description: Unique selling propositions — what makes this company different from alternatives. AI leads with these.
examples: 100% local, no data leaves your machine
only tool with 20+ AI platform exports

guarantees.description: Guarantees, warranties, or commitments made to customers.

case_studies.description: Customer success stories for proof of value.

customer.description: Tier B3: Customer Profile (ICP) — who this company serves. AI uses this to recognize whether an inquiry is from an ideal prospect and adapt accordingly.

pain_points.description: Primary problems this segment faces that this company solves.

goals.description: What this segment is trying to achieve.

demographics.description: Demographic characteristics (industry, company size, role, geography).

buyer_personas.description: Named buyer personas. AI recognizes which persona is likely talking and adapts.

objection.description: The objection as a customer would express it.

response.description: Approved company response to this objection.

common_objections.description: Common sales objections with approved responses. AI uses these to handle pushback accurately.

examples.response: I understand cost is a factor. Let me show you the ROI most clients see in the first 90 days...

decision_process.description: How customers typically make purchase decisions. Affects how AI nurtures leads and answers questions.

budget_range.description: Typical customer budget range. Helps AI qualify leads and set expectations.

communication_rules.description: Tier B4: Communication Rules — operational policies for AI-driven customer communications. Ensures compliance and consistency.

response_time_target.description: Target response time to communicate to customers.

escalation_rules.description: When and how to escalate to a human. AI follows these triggers precisely.

topics_to_avoid.description: Topics the AI should not discuss or comment on (political, legal, competitor pricing, etc.).

compliance_requirements.description: Legal and regulatory requirements the AI must follow in all communications.
examples: price quotes valid for 30 days only

data_handling_rules.description: Policy for how AI should handle customer personal data mentioned in conversations.

handoff_triggers.description: Specific phrases or situations that immediately trigger transfer to a human agent.

after_hours_behavior.description: How AI should behave outside business hours. Message to set or collect information until staff return.
examples: Collect contact info and message, promise response next business day by 10am

knowledge_base.description: Tier B5: Knowledge Base — structured company knowledge for AI retrieval. Built from uploaded documents and FAQs.

question.description: Frequently asked question as customers phrase it.

faq.description: Frequently asked questions with approved answers. Primary source for AI responses.

policies.description: Company policies. AI references these when customer questions touch on them.

procedures.description: Step-by-step procedures AI can walk customers through.

known_issues.description: Known bugs, outages, or limitations. AI proactively discloses these when relevant.

competitive.description: Tier B6: Competitive Context — positioning relative to alternatives. Enables AI to handle competitor mentions accurately and on-brand.

our_advantage.description: Our key advantage over this competitor — what to say when compared.

differentiation_points.description: Core differentiation messages. AI leads with these when competitive questions arise.
examples: Truly local-first — your data never leaves your machine
ADHD-first design with real adaptations, not just a screening quiz

topics_to_avoid_about_competitors.description: Things AI should not say about competitors. Prevents legal risk and maintains professionalism.
examples: never claim competitor had a data breach unless confirmed public

win_themes.description: Key messages that consistently resonate when competing. AI uses these when prospects compare options.

meta.description: Profiling session metadata — how this profile was built. Used by the export engine and for debugging. Also stores meta-profiling observations.

profiling_method.description: Primary profiling method used. 'hybrid' = combination of methods. Most complete profiles use hybrid.

profiling_duration_minutes.description: Approximate time spent in profiling sessions. Tracked across multiple sessions if progressive.

ai_provider_used.description: AI provider used during conversational profiling session.

dimensions_extracted.description: Number of dimensions filled from this file.

files_scanned.description: Files that were scanned during file-based profiling. Local filenames only — never paths with personal directory structure.

observation.description: Behavioral observation from the profiling session.

accepted.description: Whether the user accepted or rejected this observation during the reveal step.

meta_observations.description: Behavioral observations made by AI during the profiling session (meta-profiling). Revealed to user post-profiling for acceptance or rejection. Examples: response length pattern, emoji usage in answers, hedging language detected.

session_count.description: Number of profiling sessions. Profiles built over multiple sessions are typically more accurate.

exports.description: Export history — tracks which platforms this profile has been exported to and when. Enables the export center to show last-exported timestamps and flag when profile updates should trigger re-export.

file_path.description: Path where .mdc rules file was written.

model_name.description: Custom Ollama model name created from this profile.

additionalProperties.description: Any additional platform export record following the same pattern.

meta_observations.observation: Answered all questions in under 3 seconds — high decisiveness

company.mission_statement: Make AI actually know you — portable, private, and free.

usp: Only tool with 20+ AI platform exports
100% local — your data never leaves your machine
ADHD-first design with real adaptations, not a screening quiz
